name: com.sergiolinarescodes.ppo-racing-trainer
description: Runtime AI racing driver trained with PPO via Unity ML-Agents. Provides the AiDriverAgent prefab, ONNX policies, observation/physics services, and Reflex DI installers consumable from any Unity project. The training side of the workflow lives in the host repository (https://github.com/sergiolinarescodes/unity-ppo-racing-trainer) alongside the Python tooling under tools/.
